iteration_1.changes: Replaced 483-line verbose SKILL.md with focused 113-line version based on python-pptx only. Removed html2pptx, OOXML, template sections. Added structured extraction and number parsing examples.

iteration_2.changes: Added venv setup instructions (python3 -m venv .venv). Changed text extraction to use python-pptx instead of markitdown. pptx-extract failure was model hallucination of output data.

iteration_3.changes: Added guidance to check for existing .venv before creating one. Added IMPORTANT note to verify output file contents after running scripts.

iteration_4.changes: Confirmation run with no changes. Both tasks consistently pass.

key_changes: Reduced SKILL.md from 483 lines to ~130 lines (73% reduction)
Focused exclusively on python-pptx (removed html2pptx, OOXML, templates)
Added explicit venv setup instructions critical for opencode runtime
Added structured JSON extraction pattern with title/bullet separation
Added number parsing helpers (parse_money, parse_pct) for financial data
Added verification guidance to prevent model hallucination
Removed unused files: html2pptx.md, ooxml.md, ooxml/, scripts/
